text:
User: when tenex-edge starts, regardless of command, show me the configured relay that will be used

Assistant: The right place is the top of `cli::run()` before the match dispatch. Print to stderr so it doesn't interfere with stdout-based consumers like `statusline`. [...] ```
[tenex-edge] home=/Users/pablofernandez/.tenex-edge relays=ws://127.0.0.1:9888
```
